title: phlomoides pedunculata
intro: Phlomoides pedunculata, also known as Lycopsis pedunculata or Hungarian lavender, is a flowering plant species in the mint family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phlomoides pedunculata include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Phlomoides pedunculata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
